author: LinOnetwo
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tag-tree-picker-macro/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tag-tree-picker-macro/readme","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"!! Macro usage This traditional tag list will show tags in a line: ```tw5 <$vars currentTiddler="$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-calendar/settings/frequently-used-tags" tagField="text"> {{||$:/core/ui/EditTemplate/tags}} ``` But this plugin provides a `tag-tree-picker` macro to show tags in a tree: ```tw5 <$transclude $variable="tag-tree-picker" tags={{TiddlerWithListOfTags}} /> ``` `tags` parameter receive a list of tiddler name, if those tiddlers have tree relationship, show then as tree. To make click-on-it work, you need to define `tag-tree-button-action` macro in the context, this is work as a `onClick` callback action: ```tw5 \define tag-tree-button-action(tagName) <$action-navigate $to="$tagName$" /> \end \define tag-tree-button-action(tagName) <$action-listops $tags="[[$tagName$]]" $tiddler="""$(targetTiddler)$""" /> \end \define tag-tree-button-action(tagName) <$action-listops $tags="[[$tagName$]]" $tiddler="Index" /> \end ``` Note that tags in this tree are buttons, so action is not "add tag to currentTiddler" by default, you need to define the onClick action you want. !! Example A tag picker ```tw5 \define tag-tree-button-action(tagName) <$action-listops $tags="[[$tagName$]]" $tiddler="""$(targetTiddler)$""" /> \end \define empty-list-help-text()

You can goto Plugin Setting in control panel or plugin page, add frequently used tags here.

\end
<$let targetTiddler=<> > <$list filter="[list[$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-calendar/settings/frequently-used-tags!!text]first[]then[yes]]" storyview="pop" emptyMessage=<>>
<$transclude $variable="input-only-tag-tree" tags={{$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-calendar/settings/frequently-used-tags}} />
``` [img[Screenshot1.png]] [img[Screenshot2.png]] "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-calendar/style.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-calendar/style.css","creator":"LinOnetwo","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":".linonetwo-tag-tree-picker-macro button { border: 0; cursor: pointer; }"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tag-tree-picker-macro/tree":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tag-tree-picker-macro/tree","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<>"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tag-tree-picker-macro/tagTreeMacro.js":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tag-tree-picker-macro/tagTreeMacro.js","type":"application/javascript","module-type":"macro","tags":"$:/tags/Macro","Modern.TiddlyDev#Origin":"tagTreeMacro.ts","text":""use strict";exports.name="tag-tree-picker",exports.params=[{name:"tags"}];var textMacros=` \\define tag-styles() background-color:$(backgroundColor)$; fill:$(foregroundColor)$; color:$(foregroundColor)$; \\end \\define tag-body-inner(colour,fallbackTarget,colourA,colourB,icon) \\whitespace trim <$vars foregroundColor=<> backgroundColor="""$colour$"""> <$button class="tc-tag-label" style=<>> <$transclude $variable="tag-tree-button-action" tagName=<> /> <$transclude tiddler="""$icon$"""/> <$transclude field="caption"> <$view field="title"/> \\end `;function buildTocWithOfferedTiddlers(r,t,e){var o=t.get(r)??[],l=$tw.wiki.getTiddlerText("$:/palette")??"$:/palettes/Vanilla",l=` <$let currentTiddler="${r}" icon={{{ [[${r}]] :cascade[all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/TiddlerIconFilter]!is[draft]get[text]] }}} fallbackTarget={{${l}##tag-background}} colourA={{${l}##foreground}} colourB={{${l}##background}} colour={{{ [[${r}]] :cascade[all[shadows+tiddlers]tag[$:/tags/TiddlerColourFilter]!is[draft]get[text]] }}} > <$macrocall $name="tag-body-inner" colour=<> fallbackTarget=<> colourA=<> colourB=<> icon=<>/> `;if(0===o.length)return l;const a=new Set(e);a.add(r);o=o.filter(r=>!a.has(r)).map(r=>`
  • ${buildTocWithOfferedTiddlers(r,t,a)}
    • `).join("");return 0===o.length?l:l+`
      ${o}
    `}exports.run=function(r=""){var t=$tw.utils.parseStringArray(r).filter(r=>0{var t=$tw.wiki.getTiddler(r);return void 0===t||!(t.fields.tags??[]).some(r=>e.has(r))}),a=0 ${a.map(r=>buildTocWithOfferedTiddlers(r,o,new Set)).map(r=>`
  • ${r}
    • `).join("")} `};"}}}
title: $:/plugins/linonetwo/tag-tree-picker-macro
